release"}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":14,"created_at":"2024-10-09T16:31:40Z","updated_at":"2024-11-29T17:16:37Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","sub_issues_summary":{"total":0,"completed":0,"percent_completed":0},"active_lock_reason":null,"body":"On Julia 1.11.0, generating a new package whose `src/MWE.jl` is just the following, where we print the `pkgdir` for the current `@__MODULE__`:

```julia
module MWE

greet() = print("Hello World!")

function __init__()
    println(@__MODULE__)
    println(pkgdir(@__MODULE__))
end

end # module MWE
```

produces the following when being loaded (note the `nothing` for `pkgdir`):

```jlcon
julia> using MWE
[ Info: Precompiling MWE [07383931-b36a-4268-bd90-eec35e6fd057]
MWE
nothing
```

However, on Julia 1.10.5, the proper directory is printed:

```
julia> using MWE
  No Changes to `/tmp/tmp.s4wO5AcljZ/MWE/Project.toml`
  No Changes to `/tmp/tmp.s4wO5AcljZ/MWE/Manifest.toml`
Precompiling MWE
  1 dependency successfully precompiled in 1 seconds
MWE
/tmp/tmp.s4wO5AcljZ/MWE
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56077/reactions","total_count":1,"+1":1,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56077/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/2508177112","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56077#issuecomment-2508177112","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56077","id":2508177112,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM6Vf77Y","user":{"login":"MichaelAguadze","id":53962796,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjUzOTYyNzk2","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/53962796?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze","html_url":"https://github.com/MichaelAguadze","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/MichaelAguadze/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-11-29T17:16:36Z","updated_at":"2024-11-29T17:16:36Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"I added the DiffEqGPU.jl package but failing to precompile on M1 pro.
